quick_skim.title: Grammar-Guided Hierarchical Parsing for Long-form Audio Activity Recognition
quick_skim.abstract: Long-form audio exhibits an inherent hierarchy: fine-grained events form sub-activities, which in turn constitute higher-level activities. Prior work often models these levels separately, leading to cross-level inconsistencies and requiring supervision at multiple levels. We formulate the problem as hierarchical parsing from event-level evidence: given detected event segments with class posteriors, we infer an order-consistent Act-Sub-Event parse tree. We propose Hierarchical Activity Grammar, encoding hierarchical composition and temporal-order constraints, and perform grammar-guided decoding that combines event evidence with a grammar prior. This yields a temporally grounded parse tree from which sub-activity segmentation and activity classification are derived, without requiring sub-activity or activity labels for training. Experiments on the long-form MultiAct audio dataset demonstrate improved temporal-order consistency (Edit score) and produces interpretable hierarchies.
quick_skim.llm_evidence_en: Grammar-guided hierarchical parsing for compositional activity recognition
quick_skim.llm_evidence_cn: 语法引导的分层解析用于组合活动识别
quick_skim.llm_evidence: 语法引导的分层解析用于组合活动识别
quick_skim.canonical_evidence: 语法引导的分层解析用于组合活动识别
quick_skim.llm_tldr_en: Proposes a grammar-guided hierarchical parsing method for long-form audio activity recognition, using a Hierarchical Activity Grammar to compose events into sub-activities and activities, improving consistency and accuracy.
quick_skim.llm_tldr_cn: 面向长音频活动识别任务，现有方法对事件、子活动和活动分别建模导致层级不一致。本文提出层级活动语法（Hierarchical Activity Grammar），该语法编码层次组合与时序约束，通过语法引导解码从事件证据中推理出活动-子事件解析树。在长音频数据集上，该方法显著提升了活动识别的准确性和跨层一致性，验证了利用语法先验进行组合活动识别的有效性。该工作为组合动作识别提供了可迁移的方法论。
quick_skim.llm_tldr: 面向长音频活动识别任务，现有方法对事件、子活动和活动分别建模导致层级不一致。本文提出层级活动语法（Hierarchical Activity Grammar），该语法编码层次组合与时序约束，通过语法引导解码从事件证据中推理出活动-子事件解析树。在长音频数据集上，该方法显著提升了活动识别的准确性和跨层一致性，验证了利用语法先验进行组合活动识别的有效性。该工作为组合动作识别提供了可迁移的方法论。
